hooks.command:
echo 'ProductionOS 5.3 — Your AI Engineering Team
43 agents | 14 commands | 118 tests passing

Start here:
  /production-upgrade      Audit + fix any codebase
  /productionos-help       Usage guide

Scale up:
  /omni-plan               13-step pipeline with tri-tiered judging
  /auto-swarm "task"       Parallel agent swarm
  /deep-research [topic]   8-phase research
  /security-audit          7-domain security sweep

Max power:
  /omni-plan-nth           Recursive until 10/10
  /auto-swarm-nth "task"   Recursive swarm (100% coverage)
  /max-research [topic]    500-1000 agents (nuclear)

Tools:
  /agentic-eval /context-engineer /logic-mode /learn-mode /productionos-update'; command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1 || echo 'WARNING: bun not installed — validation scripts unavailable. Core commands still work.'
